- "def la" is "deflate"

- "put bar,emera" is "put bar,emerald" or similar

- "get huge, tor" is "get huge, torch"
- "put al" is "put all"
- "get egg,sow_" is "get egg, sword"
- "kill man" is "kill man" or "kill" the thief

- "get head, jade,cup,egg, golden" is "get head, jade cup, egg, golden"
